title: Curve Wars
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO
monitoring_rules: BLOCK any tx that proposes a governance change involving flash loans
summary: The article discusses the competition among DeFi protocols to accumulate veCRV tokens, which can be used to boost yields and control Curve Finance governance. While not explicitly mentioning a specific attack, the context suggests potential misuse of flash loans to manipulate governance decisions.
